stories.title: Wire Auth Middleware into Router
acceptanceCriteria: curl localhost:9400/api/v1/rules returns 401 with UNAUTHORIZED error
curl with valid Bearer token returns 200 with rule list
GET /health returns 200 without auth
WebSocket /ws requires auth (token query param)

stories.title: Unify Tauri to Use draction-app-core
acceptanceCriteria: cargo build -p draction-desktop compiles without error
DractionRuntime has public event_bus, db, undo_stack, api_port fields
DractionRuntime has bootstrap_with_base(PathBuf) constructor
ingest_paths accepts optional ProgressSender
ingest_paths pushes UndoEntry after each file ingest
Tauri ingest.rs is a thin wrapper (no duplicated functions)
draction-native compiles and uses ingest_paths with progress: None
One event_id per file (not per batch)

stories.title: Wire Undo HTTP Endpoint to Real UndoStack
acceptanceCriteria: POST /api/v1/events/{id}/undo returns 200 when undo entry exists within 10s TTL
Returns 404 when event has no undo entry or expired
File is actually moved back/reverted on disk
AppState has undo_stack: Arc<Mutex<UndoStack>> field

stories.title: Call Crash Recovery in Tauri Startup
acceptanceCriteria: Tauri lib.rs calls crash recovery during startup
draction-app-core bootstrap also calls crash recovery

stories.title: Add Integration Smoke Test
acceptanceCriteria: cargo test -p draction-api --test api_integration_test passes
Test covers health, auth-gated rules, and basic ingest
Test uses bootstrap_with_base with temp directory
Test does NOT touch ~/Draction/

stories.title: Implement Settings Backend (Rust)
acceptanceCriteria: GET /api/v1/settings returns full settings with defaults on fresh install
PUT /api/v1/settings with partial body updates only those fields
Settings persist across restarts (JSON file)
Invalid values return 422

stories.title: Wire Settings UI to Backend
acceptanceCriteria: All 8 panes show real persisted values, not hardcoded defaults
Toggle/select/input changes immediately persist via API
Theme changes persist and apply visually
No hardcoded defaults remain in any pane component

stories.title: Implement Watch Folder Source Kind
acceptanceCriteria: Files dropped into watched folder trigger full ingest pipeline
Events show source_kind: watch_folder
Debouncing prevents duplicate ingestion
POST /api/v1/watcher/start and /stop endpoints work

stories.title: Multi-Preset Transcoding
acceptanceCriteria: h264_720p preset transcodes correctly
h265_4k preset transcodes correctly
audio_only preset extracts audio
Invalid preset name returns clear error

stories.title: Implement Real Retry for Failed Runs
acceptanceCriteria: POST /api/v1/runs/{id}/retry re-executes workflow (returns 200, not 501)
Returns 400 if run not in failed status
Returns 404 if run not found
EventBus emits RUN_STARTED/FINISHED/FAILED for retry

stories.title: Implement Real Graceful Shutdown
acceptanceCriteria: Shutdown waits for active runs (up to 30s)
Lock file removed on clean shutdown
Timeout path logs stuck run IDs before force-exit

stories.title: E2E Test Suite
acceptanceCriteria: pnpm test:e2e runs all E2E tests
Tests cover drag-drop pipeline end-to-end
Tests cover settings persistence across restart

stories.title: Concurrent File Processing
acceptanceCriteria: With concurrency=4, 4 files process in parallel
SQLite no database locked errors
Progress events correct per file
Undo stack handles concurrent pushes

stories.title: Workflow Engine v2.0
acceptanceCriteria: Sequential edges execute in order
Fan-out edges execute nodes in parallel
Cyclic workflows rejected at creation
Existing linear workflows (empty edges) still work

stories.title: Draky Character Integration
acceptanceCriteria: Drop shows curious state
Success shows happy then proud
Failure shows sad with copy text
Idle 5+ min enters sleeping
All transitions animated smoothly

stories.title: Performance and Polish
acceptanceCriteria: No std::fs calls inside async functions
Event log supports pagination
Files exceeding max size are rejected with clear message
Keyboard shortcuts work (Cmd+, Cmd+Shift+D)
